{{Infobox concept
| name = Night Wheel
| introduced = cradle-06-underlord
}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Night Wheel]] has a swirling purple center.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c8">''Underlord'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Night Wheel]] is overhead.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c10">''Underlord'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Night Wheel]] spins slowly overhead in the valley.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c17">''Underlord'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
